overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character walking through ancient Alexandria. The character traverses market courtyards, stone staircases, narrow residential alleys, and open plazas with Roman-Egyptian architecture under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient market courtyard with red columns and stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through market courtyard passing stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child in green tunic running past the character

entered.detail: tall cylindrical red columns supporting a portico structure
wooden frame with orange fabric roof covering market stalls
multi-story stone structure with tiled roof in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit market courtyard with distinctive red marble columns on the left and an orange canopy covering market stalls. The cobblestone ground is uneven, and various NPCs populate the area including a child who runs past the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase between ancient building walls

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing weathered stone stairs between tall building walls

entered.detail: wide weathered stone steps casting strong shadows
aged stone walls with faded red painted sections

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and ascends a wide stone staircase between enclosing walls. The area is empty of pedestrians, with sunlight creating dramatic shadows across the worn stone steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential courtyard with hanging laundry and large tree

events.description: exits staircase into shaded courtyard with large central tree
character pushes past NPC in blue dress who raises arms in reaction

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow courtyard passing NPCs and market goods

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking toward character, gets pushed aside

entered.detail: large mature tree providing shade over the courtyard
colorful cloths and fabrics hanging on lines between buildings
piles of sacks, baskets, and market wares

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the character enters a shaded residential courtyard dominated by a large tree. Colorful laundry hangs between buildings, and the character pushes past a woman in a blue dress who reacts by raising her arms.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with domed pavilion and monumental column

events.description: exits narrow alley into bright open plaza with domed structure
camel with rider passes from right to left across the path

agents.ego_description: walking across open plaza toward domed building

notable_agents.action: rider on camel crossing the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: circular building with golden dome and red fabric awning
monumental column with decorative base and capital
classical style building with columns and red door

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow passage into a bright, open plaza featuring a prominent domed pavilion with a golden roof. A rider on a camel crosses the plaza from right to left, while a tall monumental column stands on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city avenue with obelisk view and synagogue

events.description: group of horse riders pass by on the left side
text overlay identifies building as Synagogue

agents.ego_description: walking down main avenue passing various pedestrians and riders

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horses and camels moving along the street

entered.detail: tall stone obelisk visible at the end of the street
large stone building with columns and red window shutters
tall red flags on poles lining the avenue

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a main city avenue with a distant obelisk visible at the end of the street. The Synagogue building appears on the left with its distinctive architecture, while riders on horses and camels pass by. Red banners line the right side of the avenue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling market courtyard through narrow residential quarters and into the grand, open avenues of ancient Alexandria. It begins amidst the activity of a sunlit market, passing red marble columns and orange canopies as a child runs past the character on uneven cobblestones. The camera then turns left to ascend a wide, quiet stone staircase where dramatic shadows fall across the worn steps, before emerging into a shaded residential courtyard filled with hanging laundry and a large central tree. As the character pushes past a woman in a blue dress, the scene opens into a bright plaza featuring a golden-roofed domed pavilion and a rider on a camel crossing near a monumental column. Finally, the movement flows onto a main city avenue lined with red banners, passing the distinctive architecture of the Synagogue while horse and camel riders move toward a distant obelisk.
